narrative:
Lemon Twp 1 (precinct in Butler County) has 395 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
